title: [TACZ] DeltaForce Melee Pack
description: DeltaForce melee addon pack for TAZC & LesRaisins Tactical Equipment
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3tYsgtNr/images/2871d3c23629e9bcfa97c15d0ad9162a1ccefa17.jpeg)
## Contents
![banner1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3tYsgtNr/images/b32cb2e1a69c868962ff03ca60bda749c642da81.png)

An addon pack for TACZ and LesRaisins Tactical Equipments, adds some popular melee weapons from *Delta Force* to the game.  
Includes six well-made animation/modeling weapons currently:
- Cobra 
- Vanguard 
- Mercy 
- Desmoulins' Edge 
- Sea Gleam 
- TAC Dagger

## Dependencies
![banner2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3tYsgtNr/images/b1cd8e4b7fd02d5f5e88c95e90abd06aa3397600.png)

 This is a MOD, Please put the `.jar` file in the mods folder but not in tacz gun pack path. You need **tacz 1.1.6+** and **lesraisins tactical 0.3.0+** above as dependency
